uplink.description: cyclic energy data (1): power + HT/NT consumption + delivery counters
uplink._note: Upstream Energy_Data Value [47,602997.1,0,65818.8]: Power 47 W -> power.active; Consumption HT 602997.1 Wh -> metering.energy.total; NT 0 Wh and Delivery 65818.8 Wh -> extras.

uplink.description: cyclic energy data (2): higher instantaneous power, same counters
uplink._note: Upstream Energy_Data Value [100,603001.1,0,65818.8]; Power 100 W -> power.active, Consumption HT -> metering.energy.total.

uplink.description: minimal 16-byte Sensor_Data: power + HT consumption only
uplink._note: Power raw 1000/100=10 W; HT counter raw 12345/10=1234.5 Wh -> metering.energy.total. Covers power-meter atLeastOne with only the mandatory two-block frame.

uplink.description: HT counter reports Unknown sentinel (0xFFFFFFFFFF) -> warning, no energy.total
uplink._note: Upstream maps 0xFFFFFFFFFF energy counter to the string 'Unknown'; a string cannot occupy numeric metering.energy.total, so it is surfaced as the energyStatus extra with a warning.

uplink.description: Device_Info startup frame: diagnostics only (battery from supply voltage)
uplink._note: Upstream Device_Info: Bootloader 1.0.0, Firmware 1.0.3, Hw_Revision 2, Supply_Voltage 2.94 -> battery.
Device app data is only sent on fPort 10; upstream sets parser_error 'Wrong Port Number'.
Header is TX reason + supply voltage + frame type = 3 bytes minimum.
